rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF HECTOR VALLANUEVA
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Production Of Documentsand For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Matter on Calendar for Monday, August 7, 2006. Petitioner Hector Gonzalez's motion to compel production of documents is granted. The Court has read and considered the late-filed opposition. Defendant is ordered to produce responsive documents within 15 days of notice of this order. The request for monetary sanctions is denied. = (610/BEC)
